strategies.title: Time Series Momentum Effect
strategies.description: Goes long assets with positive recent returns and short assets with negative recent returns using time-series signals across futures markets in bonds, commodities, currencies, and equities.

strategies.title: Short Term Reversal with Futures
strategies.description: Exploits short-term reversal patterns in futures markets by taking contrarian positions on recent losers and winners across multiple asset classes on a weekly basis.

strategies.title: Asset Class Trend-Following
strategies.description: Applies a simple trend-following rule using 10-month moving averages across major asset classes, switching between risk assets and cash to avoid major drawdowns.

strategies.title: Momentum Asset Allocation Strategy
strategies.description: Allocates capital to asset classes with the strongest recent momentum, rotating between bonds, commodities, equities, and REITs based on relative performance.

strategies.title: Paired Switching
strategies.description: Switches between paired assets (stocks and bonds) on a quarterly basis based on relative momentum, allocating fully to the better-performing asset of the pair.

strategies.title: FED Model
strategies.description: Compares earnings yield of equities to bond yields to determine relative valuation, overweighting equities when earnings yield exceeds bond yields and vice versa.

strategies.title: Value and Momentum Factors across Asset Classes
strategies.description: Constructs combined value and momentum factor portfolios across bonds, equities, and REITs, demonstrating that these factors are pervasive across asset classes.

strategies.title: Skewness Effect in Commodities
strategies.description: Exploits the skewness premium in commodity futures by going long commodities with negative skewness and short those with positive skewness, capturing the skewness risk premium.

strategies.title: Return Asymmetry Effect in Commodity Futures
strategies.description: Trades commodity futures based on return asymmetry measures, going long contracts with favorable asymmetry profiles and short those with unfavorable return distributions.

strategies.title: Momentum Effect in Commodities
strategies.description: Applies cross-sectional momentum to commodity futures, buying recent winners and selling recent losers among commodity contracts on a monthly basis.

strategies.title: Term Structure Effect in Commodities
strategies.description: Exploits the term structure of commodity futures by going long backwardated contracts and short contango contracts, capturing the roll yield differential.

strategies.title: Trading WTI/BRENT Spread
strategies.description: Trades the spread between WTI and Brent crude oil futures using mean-reversion signals, entering when the spread deviates significantly from its historical average.

strategies.title: Overnight Seasonality in Bitcoin
strategies.description: Captures the overnight return premium in Bitcoin by holding positions during overnight hours and closing during regular trading hours, exploiting intraday seasonality patterns.

strategies.title: Rebalancing Premium in Cryptocurrencies
strategies.description: Harvests the rebalancing premium by periodically rebalancing a cryptocurrency portfolio to target weights, profiting from mean-reversion in volatile crypto markets.

strategies.title: FX Carry Trade
strategies.description: Goes long high-yielding currencies and short low-yielding currencies, capturing the interest rate differential (carry) across developed and emerging market currency pairs.

strategies.title: Dollar Carry Trade
strategies.description: Trades the US dollar against a basket of currencies based on the aggregate interest rate differential, going long or short the dollar based on carry signals.

strategies.title: Currency Momentum Factor
strategies.description: Applies cross-sectional momentum to currency pairs, buying currencies with strong recent appreciation and selling those with recent depreciation.

strategies.title: Currency Value Factor PPP Strategy
strategies.description: Values currencies using purchasing power parity (PPP), going long undervalued currencies and short overvalued ones relative to their PPP-implied fair value.

strategies.title: Asset Growth Effect
strategies.description: Exploits the negative relationship between asset growth and future stock returns by going long firms with low asset growth and short firms with high asset growth.

strategies.title: Short Term Reversal Effect in Stocks
strategies.description: Profits from short-term mean reversion in stock prices by buying recent losers and selling recent winners over weekly horizons.

strategies.title: Reversal During Earnings-Announcements
strategies.description: Exploits price reversals that occur around earnings announcement dates, taking contrarian positions against pre-announcement price movements.

strategies.title: Size Factor Small Capitalization Stocks Premium
strategies.description: Captures the small-cap premium by going long small capitalization stocks and short large capitalization stocks, rebalanced annually.

strategies.title: Low Volatility Factor Effect in Stocks
strategies.description: Exploits the low-volatility anomaly by going long low-volatility stocks and short high-volatility stocks, earning a risk-adjusted premium from the volatility effect.

strategies.title: How to Use Lexical Density of Company Filings
strategies.description: Uses natural language processing to measure lexical density of company filings (10-K, 10-Q) as a signal for future stock returns, going long firms with clearer disclosures.

strategies.title: Volatility Risk Premium Effect
strategies.description: Harvests the volatility risk premium by selling options or variance swaps, profiting from the systematic overpricing of implied volatility relative to realized volatility.

strategies.title: Pairs Trading with Stocks
strategies.description: Identifies cointegrated stock pairs and trades the spread between them, going long the underperformer and short the outperformer when the spread deviates from equilibrium.

strategies.title: Crude Oil Predicts Equity Returns
strategies.description: Uses crude oil price changes as a leading indicator for equity market returns, adjusting equity exposure based on recent oil price momentum signals.

strategies.title: Betting Against Beta Factor in Stocks
strategies.description: Constructs a leveraged portfolio of low-beta stocks and a deleveraged portfolio of high-beta stocks, profiting from the empirical flatness of the security market line.

strategies.title: Trend-following Effect in Stocks
strategies.description: Applies trend-following rules to individual stocks using moving average crossovers or breakout signals, going long stocks in uptrends and avoiding or shorting those in downtrends.

strategies.title: ESG Factor Momentum Strategy
strategies.description: Combines ESG rating changes with momentum signals, going long stocks with improving ESG scores and positive momentum and short those with deteriorating ESG and negative momentum.

strategies.title: Value Book-to-Market Factor
strategies.description: Classic Fama-French value factor that goes long stocks with high book-to-market ratios and short stocks with low book-to-market ratios.

strategies.title: Soccer Clubs Stocks Arbitrage
strategies.description: Trades publicly listed soccer club stocks based on match results and betting odds, exploiting the overreaction of stock prices to game outcomes.

strategies.title: Synthetic Lending Rates Predict Subsequent Market Return
strategies.description: Uses synthetic lending rates derived from options markets as a predictor for short-term equity market returns, signaling institutional demand for shorting.

strategies.title: Option-Expiration Week Effect
strategies.description: Captures the positive return anomaly during options expiration weeks by going long equity indexes in the week surrounding monthly options expiration dates.

strategies.title: Dispersion Trading
strategies.description: Trades the spread between index implied volatility and the weighted implied volatilities of its components, profiting from the correlation risk premium.

strategies.title: Momentum in Mutual Fund Returns
strategies.description: Applies momentum strategy to mutual fund selection, investing in funds with the strongest recent performance and avoiding those with poor recent returns.

strategies.title: Sector Momentum Rotational System
strategies.description: Rotates capital among equity sectors based on relative momentum, overweighting sectors with the strongest recent performance and underweighting lagging sectors.

strategies.title: Combining Smart Factors Momentum and Market Portfolio
strategies.description: Dynamically combines momentum-based smart factor portfolios with the broad market portfolio, adjusting allocation based on factor momentum signals.

strategies.title: Momentum and Reversal Combined with Volatility Effect in Stocks
strategies.description: Combines momentum, reversal, and volatility signals to construct a composite equity strategy, weighting factors based on their interaction effects.

strategies.title: Market Sentiment and an Overnight Anomaly
strategies.description: Exploits the overnight return anomaly conditional on market sentiment indicators, capturing positive overnight returns during periods of elevated sentiment.

strategies.title: January Barometer
strategies.description: Uses January equity returns as a predictor for full-year market direction: positive January returns signal a bullish year, leading to increased equity exposure.

strategies.title: R&D Expenditures and Stock Returns
strategies.description: Goes long firms with high R&D expenditures relative to market capitalization and short those with low R&D intensity, capturing the innovation premium.

strategies.title: Value Factor CAPE Effect within Countries
strategies.description: Uses the cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings (CAPE) ratio to allocate across country equity markets, overweighting countries with low CAPE and underweighting those with high CAPE.

strategies.title: 12 Month Cycle in Cross-Section of Stocks Returns
strategies.description: Exploits the 12-month return cycle in the cross-section of stock returns, going long stocks that performed well in the same calendar month in prior years.

strategies.title: Turn of the Month in Equity Indexes
strategies.description: Captures the turn-of-the-month effect by going long equity indexes around month-end and month-beginning days when returns tend to be systematically higher.

strategies.title: Payday Anomaly
strategies.description: Exploits the systematic positive returns around common paydays when retail investor inflows push equity prices higher, going long indexes on predicted payday dates.

strategies.title: Pairs Trading with Country ETFs
strategies.description: Applies pairs trading to country ETFs by identifying cointegrated country pairs and trading the spread when it deviates from historical norms.
